descriptionTemplate:
Playing {Onyx Plume} for the first time each turn inflicts 840% of Castor's ATK as {Corrosion} on the target and grants 10 Aliemus.
For every 1% DMG Amplification that Castor has, the Base amount of {Corrosion} inflicted +1%.
After the battle, {Corrosion} inflicted by Castor permanently +20% during this Exploration.
{Corrosion} inflicted in Boss Battles doubles.
After inflicting {Corrosion}, Castor's DMG output +5% of the amount of {Corrosion} inflicted this turn.
DMG dealt by Castor does not remove {Corrosion}.
